violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Bag of flour being stored directly on the floor. Advise storing off the floor.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Sleeve of paper towels stored under the 3 sink system.
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. -Bagged Linens stored directly on floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sanitation bucket found in hand sink.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at greater than 400ppm Quat solution. *~1/2 cap of current Quat chemical to water filled to the 2 liter line on sani bucket should make a 200ppm Quat solution. Use Quat test strips regularly to verify solution concentrations.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. -Moisture/staining at under side of cutting board. *Ensure cutting board fully air dries before being returned to prep table brackets.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sani bucket in hand sink basin.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
